creator: frederic@culot.org
text:
Update to 0.8.0:
- USE_PYTHON variable updated to explicitely require at least python v2.3
- NEWS file added to DOCS variable (appeared with archivemail version 0.8.0)
- EXAMPLES updated (py extension removed by vendor from script name)
- NOPORTEXAMPLES test introduced to conditionally install example scripts
- files/patch-archivemail not needed anymore
- pkg-plist updated

Changes: http://archivemail.git.sourceforge.net/git/gitweb.cgi?p=archivemail/archivemail;a=blob;f=CHANGELOG;hb=HEAD
